name: §6Dolphin
description:
§8Fishing Pet

§7Intelligence: §b100
§7Sea Creature Chance: §35%

§6Pod Tactics
§7Grants §b+10☂ Fishing Speed §7for
§7each player within §a30 §7blocks, up to §a5
§7players.

§6Echolocation
§7Grants §3+10α Sea Creature Chance§7.

§6Splash Surprise
§7Stun §3Sea Creatures §7for §a5s §7after
§7fishing them up.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Lunar Sea Horse Dolphin Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aDolphin§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
